backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that stores payment records in a map and exposes `submitPayment` (write) and `getAllPayments` (query, sorted by name) endpoints.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the light-theme replacement feature, listing the affected frontend files and confirming high confidence via test REQ-8.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-line descriptions of each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens (background, foreground, card, accent, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a `#root` div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that simply renders the `PaymentPage` as the sole view.
frontend/src/components/PaymentForm.tsx: Payment form component with field-level validation display, amber/light theme styling, a loading state during submission, and a success confirmation screen after payment.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor, recreating it when the Internet Identity changes and invalidating dependent queries accordingly.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout, and exposing identity and status to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/usePaymentForm.ts: Custom hook managing payment form state, per-field validation logic, auto-formatting for card number and expiry date, and form reset functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query mutation hook that calls the backend `submitPayment` actor method and invalidates the payments query cache on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, defines a light-theme OKLCH color palette (neutral and amber/gold), and declares reusable component classes for payment card, input, and gold button styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider, then mounts it to the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: Full-page layout component for the payment UI, including a sticky header with branding, trust badges, the PaymentForm component, and a footer with a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that extends the theme with OKLCH-based color tokens (neutral, amber, semantic UI colors), custom border radii, box shadows, font families, and animation keyframes, while enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking the current version, feature history (payment form, fintech theme, light theme), and pending new feature requests including a backend actor for storing payment submissions.
